zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fenwick於1338年出生在英國諾圖波藍德馬特分時，他的父親Alan Fenwick41歲，母親Lady Katherine Baret39歲。他於大約1358年與Elizabeth de Heton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1412年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fenwick于1338年出生在英国諾圖波藍德馬特分时，他的父亲Alan Fenwick41岁，母亲Lady Katherine Baret39岁。他于大约1358年与Elizabeth de Heton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1412年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Fenwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Northumberland or from one in Yorkshire, all of which are so named from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. There is also a place in Ayrshire, Scotland, which has the same name and origin. This last is the source of at least some early examples of the surname: Nicholaus Fynwyk was provost of Ayr in 1313, and Reginald de Fynwyk or Fynvyk appears as bailie and alderman of the same burgh in 1387 and 1401. The name is usually pronounced ‘Fennick’.

History: The name was brought over from England by several forebears, including George Fenwick (1603–56/7), a colonist from Brinkburn, Northumberland. He was one of the group of lords and gentlemen to whom the earl of Warwick, president of the Council for New England, granted forty leagues of territory west of the Narragansett River. George took up residence with his family at Saybrook, CT, in 1639. John Fenwick of Bynfield, Berkshire, England, established himself at Salem, NJ, in June 1675, the first Quaker settlement on the Delaware.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fenwick was born in 1338, in Matfen, Northumberland, England, his father, Alan Fenwick, was 41 and his mother, Lady Katherine Baret, was 39. He married Elizabeth de Heton about 1358, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 1412.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fenwick est né en 1338, à Matfen, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Alan Fenwick, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Baret, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Heton environ 1358, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 1412.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fenwick 1338 in Matfen, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan Fenwick 41 und seine Mutter Lady Katherine Baret 39. Er hat um 1358 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Heton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1412.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fenwick è nato il nel 1338 nel Matfen, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Alan Fenwick, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Katherine Baret, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Heton circa 1358, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1412.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fenwickが1338年にイギリスノースウンバーランドマトフンで生まれた時，父Alan Fenwickは41歳，母Lady Katherine Baretは39歳であった。約1358年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでElizabeth de Hetonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1412年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fenwick(이)가 1338년 영국 노르스벌랜드 마트펜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan Fenwick(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Katherine Baret(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Elizabeth de Heton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1412년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fenwick nasceu em 1338, em Matfen, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan Fenwick, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Baret, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Heton aproximadamente 1358, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1412.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fenwick родился в 1338 г. в местности матфен, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan Fenwick было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Baret, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Heton около 1358 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1412 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fenwick nació en 1338, en Matfen, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan Fenwick, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Baret, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Heton aproximadamente 1358, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1412.
